violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. - Brewery kitchen found open coffee cup with no lid on prep table.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - In each walk-in cooler and freezer items found on floor from day before delivery.
Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 70F to 41F or below within four hours. - Found rice at 46F made 6/1. Sent to landfill

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Wall behind handwash station in barrel room server station needs repair, exposed sheetrock - RFP is coming away from wall in Founding Fathers walk-in Freezer, needs repair.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Wall behind fryers/grille in brewery kitchen has build up of grease
Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' possessions were in an area where contamination of food may occur. - Cell phone found on prep table next to fruit being cut up.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Food found on floor in walk-in cooler and freezers in main kitchen.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Scoops found in product.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Tap Room Walk-in cooler air temp found at 46F. Possibly due to staff leaving door open. Items were 42-44F - Barrel Room Prep cooler found at 45-48F. Items put on ice or moved. Ensure condiments being kept in ice are staying below 41F with enough ice surround the items.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
